entry.title: Failed to enroll - SAP Certification
entry.content:
I just faced the enroll fail issue during my C_TS462_2601 – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Sales certification exam.

While still within the allowed time (countdown active), I suddenly received a message that my enrollment was removed, which immediately blocked me from continuing the exam. A SAP case has already been raised (Case Number: 5000330967).

This situation is concerning because the interruption was not caused by the candidate, and certification attempts are limited and costly. I strongly expect SAP to handle this case fairly and not consume the exam attempt due to a technical failure at SAP side. 

I expect that SAP Certification Team to review this case urgently and ensure a fair resolution.

Certification SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Sales SAP Learning Hub

entry.title: C_S4CS (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Sales) How to best prepare for this exam ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m planning to take the C_S4CS – SAP Certified Implementation Consultant (S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales) exam soon, but I’m honestly not sure what to expect and would really appreciate some real insights.

A few things I’m curious about:

  • What is the actual exam format like?
    (MCQs, multiple answers, scenario-based, etc.)
  • How difficult is it compared to other SAP certifications?
    Is it beginner-friendly or more implementation-heavy?
  • Are the questions more theory-based or real-world scenarios?
  • How important is hands-on experience with S/4HANA Cloud vs just studying Learning Hub content?
  • Any topics that are heavily tested?
  • Did you rely more on official SAP material, practice tests, or both

Also, if you’ve already passed:

  • What would you do differently if you had to prepare again?

Thank you.

entry.title: New Question Subject Enter a subject Where do you want to post this question? Financial Management
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently a student using the SAP Learning Hub and I am very interested in building my career in SAP Financial Accounting.

In my professional background, I worked as an Accounts Payable end user, and now my goal is to become SAP certified and move toward an SAP Functional Consultant role in Finance.

As a beginner, I find the SAP learning environment very broad, and sometimes I feel confused about where to start and which courses to complete before attempting the main certification.

My target certification is:
SAP Certified – Implementation Consultant – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting.

I would sincerely appreciate your guidance on a step-by-step learning path starting from foundational courses up to the certification level.

Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Which beginner or prerequisite courses you recommend before starting the main certification learning journey

  2. Whether there are specific foundational SAP Finance or system navigation courses suitable for someone with Accounts Payable experience

  3. Any recommended practice systems or preparation resources to build confidence before taking the certification exam

My objective is to start from the basics, build strong knowledge gradually, and prepare properly for certification.

Thank you very much for your support and guidance.

Kind regards,
Syeda Munazza Bukhari

entry.title: Test results cannot be viewed.
entry.content:
I took the "SAP CERTIFICATION • C_ACT SAP Certified - Project Manager - SAP Activate" exam, but I don't know if I passed or failed.
How can I check?

【Additional Information】
The passing score for this test is 60%, and my score was 67%, so I think I passed, but the result isn't displayed.
Also, when I try to take another test, it says that I'm currently taking the "SAP CERTIFICATION • C_ACT SAP Certified - Project Manager - SAP Activate" exam.

entry.title: System under maintenance while taking system based certification
entry.content:
Not able to continue with certification and showing as 

Failed to enroll

System under maintenance ,An error occurred while enrolling. Please try again, if the issue continues contact support.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA PP Certification – What is the new system-based exam actually like?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working towards the SAP S/4HANA Production Planning (PP) certification and I’m trying to get a clearer understanding of what the new system-based exam format actually looks like in practice.

I’ve gone through the information available on SAP Learning, but I’m finding it quite high-level and not very specific, particularly around what candidates are expected to do during the exam.

I’d really appreciate any insight from those who have recently sat the PP certification (especially under the new format), specifically:

  • What proportion of the exam is system-based tasks vs traditional questions?
  • What do the system-based tasks actually look like (e.g. step-by-step instructions, scenarios, troubleshooting, etc.)?
  • Are you expected to already know exact Fiori apps/paths, or is it more about understanding the process and finding your way?
  • How time-pressured is the exam in reality?
  • How useful is the “open book” aspect during the exam — do you realistically have time to use external resources?
  • Are the questions more focused on configuration, execution, or end-to-end process understanding?

For context, I have a strong background in production planning and logistics, so I’m comfortable with the concepts — I’m mainly trying to understand how that translates into the exam environment so I can prepare effectively.

Any guidance, examples, or general advice would be hugely appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error while accessing exam page
entry.content: I have booked exam slot for today.. but access exam button is not showing but instead Enroll option is showing.

entry.title: Zertification still not possible -> can I keep my attemps
entry.content:
Hi Togherter,

I wonder if someboby has the same issue.

So I made a subscription to the learning HUB and now will end soon. End Dezember I was ready to try to get the zertificate, but the cetrification process was changed and till today it is not possible to gain the zertification. Now my learning HUB acces time will run out soon.

So I wondern, since its been like 4 months that no certification was possible (and we do not know when it finally will be available), Is there any chance of keeping the attemps that I can not use now and use them later. Since it is not my fault that I cannot do the zertification.

Does anybody has the same issue and has already contact with SAP in this regard?

 

Kind regards

 Patrick

entry.title: Exam result missing after "Under Review" status — Technical issue during session
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I recently completed a SAP certification exam online. Immediately after submission, the system showed my exam as Under Review. I waited over 48 hours as recommended, but no result was ever released.

Now, the exam no longer appears as completed in my profile. It shows as if I never took it, with all 4/4 attempts still available and no result recorded.

I have already tried waiting and checking my dashboard, but the issue persists.

Has anyone experienced this? And is there a direct SAP support contact for certification technical issues?

Any help is appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: under
entry.content:
Dear Margit,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to you directly as I noticed your helpful response regarding a similar issue with the C_IEE2E certification exam in the SAP Community.

I am experiencing what appears to be the same situation. I sat for the C_IEE2E – SAP Certified – Implementation Consultant – End-to-End Business Processes for SAP Business Suite exam on April 20, 2026 at 3:00 AM. Immediately after submission, the system marked my exam as "Under Review." After waiting more than 48 hours, the exam has completely disappeared from my profile, with all 4/4 attempts still available and no result recorded whatsoever.

I have already opened a formal support case with SAP Learning Support (Case ID: 5000336601), however I wanted to reach out to you personally given your direct experience handling this type of case.

Could you kindly advise whether my situation falls under the same category as the case you previously handled, and whether a formal recredit of my attempt would be the appropriate resolution? I want to ensure the root cause is identified before initiating any retake, so as not to unnecessarily consume one of my remaining attempts.

I sincerely appreciate your time and assistance.

Kind regards, Safa Tounakti SAP ID: P2011425353

entry.title: Best course & where to train as SAP Concur Admin (Professional)? Tips welcome!
entry.content: Hi SAP Community, I am looking to become a SAP Concur Administrator with full access to technical configurations within the platform (Professional Edition). What is the best course or certification to become a qualified SAP Concur Administrator, with a focus on technical configurations such as audit rules, expense types, approval workflows, corporate card setup, user management, and policy compliance? Where do you recommend taking this training? Any insights, personal experiences, or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP Certification practical exams - Scenario-based assessment C_S43 - Question about AI evaluation
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
has anyone here already taken the new scenario-based assessment for C_S43… (S/4HANA Asset Management)?
i'm currently preparing for the exam and would really appreciate some insights from those who have already gone through it.
The background:
A colleague of mine recently attempted the exam and unfortunately failed twice. According to him, he followed the instructions carefully and entered all the required values exactly as specified. The frustrating part: he didn't receive any meaningful feedback on what went wrong or where he made mistakes , no review at the end of the exam.
From what I understand, the AI mode for this particular exam works differently from other scenario-based assessments. Instead of interacting with an AI chatbot/avatar, it seems to only validate the values you've entered in the system.

Can anyone confirm whether that's correct?

My main questions:

SAP GUI vs. Fiori: 
For tasks where you can choose between the classic SAP GUI transaction and the Fiori app, does it actually make a difference which one you use? My assumption is that the AI only checks the resulting values in the backend tables and compares target vs. actual , meaning the frontend shouldn't matter. But I'd love to hear from someone who has tested this.


Strictness of the evaluation :
How exact does the input need to be?
For example:
Are trailing/leading whitespaces treated as errors?
Does case sensitivity play a role?
What about special characters or different Unicode variants?


Joule AI as a helper:
I read that we're allowed to use Joule for support during the exam. However, if Joule generates text with slightly different Unicode characters (e.g. typographic quotes vs. straight quotes, non-breaking spaces, etc.), this could potentially cause issues when those values are copied into the system. Has anyone experienced this?

 

The whole evaluation logic doesn't feel very transparent at the moment, and given that there's no detailed feedback after a failed attempt, it's hard to learn from mistakes.
Any experiences, tips, or pointers to official documentation would be highly appreciated!


Thanks in advance

 

BR Michael

#C_S43 #Exam

entry.title: Certification
entry.content:
HI Community,

I have given my Certification exam for C_TS462_2601, foe which cut off is 82%.

I have scored 81.63%. still system has considered it as failed.

It should be rounded off to 82%. What are your views ?

entry.title: SuccessFactors PMGM Certification
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am struggling with the PMGM certification exam. I work with certified PMGM consultants and know the material, but I keep getting exactly 25% on the system-based exam. I suspect I am missing something technical in the system configuration. I have also seen a few reddit posts of other users experiencing the same issue where they receive 25% each try.
  1. I’ve heard I need to use an assigned Group Number to replace '###' placeholders. Can anyone tell me exactly where to find this number during the exam? I have not found any in my test.
  2. I was told not to use a VPN,  but received the same score.
  3. I have opened cases but receive generic responses. How can I get a one-on-one session to understand why the automated grader is marking my work wrong?
Any help from those who have passed the system-based version recently is appreciated.

entry.title: Reschedule exam (new format) to an earlier date
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have scheduled an exam for the C_ADBTP certification (new format) and would like to reschedule it to an earlier date.

Is it possible to reschedule an exam that has already been booked but not yet taken? If so, how can I proceed?

Thank you very much

entry.title: License Error Issues during SAP BW/4HANA Data Engineer Exam Setup
entry.content:
Hi all, I’m currently preparing to take the SAP Certified Data Engineer – SAP BW/4HANA exam, and I’ve run into a recurring issue that I’m hoping someone in the community might have experienced before.

During the exam setup, we’re provided with initial credentials (for example, something like “STUDENT01”) to log into the exam systems such as T41 and CIA. However, when attempting to access these systems, I consistently encounter a “License Error Check” message.

Has anyone here experienced a similar issue while preparing for or taking SAP certification exams? If so, how did you resolve it?

I’d really appreciate any insights, suggestions, or guidance.

entry.title: system based exam access issue- System temporarily unavailable
entry.content:
Hello,

I booked an exam slot for the C_S4EWM certification exam on 09 May 2026 at 4:00 PM. However, when the scheduled time arrived, I was unable to start the exam, as shown in the screenshot.

In addition, I cannot book a new slot because the current booking is still marked as active/open in the system.

Did anyone faced the same issue

entry.title: System Failure and Lack of Immediate Support for Exam C_S4CCO_2602
entry.content:
I absolute frustration regarding my experience with the SAP Certification Hub today.

I was logged in and ready for my exam at 6.00 am , but your system failed completely. I was stuck at the "System temporarily unavailable" screen. What is even more unacceptable is that there was absolutely no one available to provide immediate support or assistance when the problem occurred. I was left stranded with a technical error on your end, with no live chat, no help desk, and no immediate way to resolve the issue to proceed with my exam. This is a massive failure in your exam administration and is extremely unprofessional for a global company like SAP.

I have spent weeks preparing for this, and my time has been completely wasted due to your system's instability and lack of support staff.

Certification Integration and Certification Center

entry.title: "System temporarily unavailable" for the C_S4CFI_2602 Certification
entry.content:
"System temporarily unavailable"

Hello everyone, good morning.

I'm trying to take the C_S4CFI_2602 certification exam. I spent the entire weekend trying, and this is the third time I've scheduled it, and I still can't take the test.

"System temporarily unavailable"

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-implementation-consultant-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-financial-accounting-1#about

Has anyone managed to solve the problem and take the exam?

I believe that if the system is unavailable, they shouldn't offer the scheduling option.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: SAP Certified Integration Developer Course Not Visible
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When I tried to check the new format of SAP Integration Developer Certification, It shows that

Exclusive content
It looks like you don’t have the necessary permissions to view this content.
Please make sure you're logged in with your SAP credentials or try switching accounts.


Link : https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-integration-developer
